title: ochyrorchis keniensis
intro: Ochyrorchis keniensis, also known as the Kenyan Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ochyrorchis keniensis are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in folk remedies in certain regions.
